Term Sheet for Series B Financing

This term sheet summarizes the principal terms of the Series B Preferred Stock financing of AlphaTech Innovations Pte. Ltd. ("Company"), UEN: T12LL3456K. 

1. **Company**: AlphaTech Innovations Pte. Ltd.

2. **Investors**: Led by Dr. Jane Tan and associates.

3. **Amount**: Total investment of SGD 8,000,000.

4. **Valuation**: Pre-money valuation of SGD 32,000,000.

5. **Purchase Price**: SGD 2.00 per share.

6. **Closing Date**: Expected on or before March 31, 2024.

7. **Lead Investor Contact**: Dr. Jane Tan, +65 6123 4567, dr.jane.tan@example.sg

8. **NRIC of Lead Investor**: https://example.sg/user/S2345678B

9. **SPA Reference**: The Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") will include standard representations and warranties.

10. **SPA Agreement**: The SPA will be executed upon satisfaction of closing conditions.

11. **Project Plan**: There is no current project plan that alters the project status or existing timelines.

12. **Additional Information**: Mr. Alan Yeo, contact via alan.yeo@examplecorp.sg, is available for further inquiries.
